items.title: Australian North set to be England selector
items.summary: Marcus North, a former Australia international and Durham's director of cricket, is set to become the first foreigner in charge of selecting the England men's team.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Yuzvendra Chahal seen vaping on flight, fresh firestorm after Riyan Parag row
items.summary: Punjab Kings spinner Yuzvendra Chahal is facing controversy after a video clip surfaced online, allegedly showing him vaping on a team flight. The footage, reportedly from a tra...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Liverpool scrap plans over Anfield ticket prices rise following supporter protests

items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
